title: Smooth font pack
body:
# About this pack
This project is a Minecraft resourcepack. It changes your font in-game.







# How to install
1. Download a file
2. Drop it into **".minecraft/resourcepacks"** folder
3. Launch game and enable in **"resourcepacks.."** pagination




# Fonts
- Sans
- Noto Sans




# Fonts Source
<https://fonts.google.com/>




# Thanks For
- Google (Sans & Noto Sans)
- Adobe (Noto Sans)
